⚑
Siege Event
Storm Over the Bosphorus
Favours: Byzantine
Event — A violent squall sweeps off the Bosphorus, soaking powder and blinding the gun crews.
Effect — No Bombard phase this round (the great cannon, if in play, also stays silent — no burst check).
SE·01
⚑
Siege Event
Rumors of a Relief Fleet
Favours: Byzantine
Event — Word races along the ramparts that a Christian relief fleet has been sighted at sea.
Effect — Advance the Powers Stirring marker +1 step.
SE·02
⚑
Siege Event
A Steady Watch
Favours: Byzantine
Event — A quiet night lets the exhausted garrison hold the line firm.
Effect — +1 Defense at one land sector (Byzantine's choice) this round.
SE·03
⚑
Siege Event
Powder & Shot Arrive
Favours: Ottoman
Event — A convoy of powder and shot rumbles into the Ottoman camp, feeding the great guns.
Effect — +1 Bombard shot this round.
SE·04
⚑
Siege Event
Famine in the City
Favours: Ottoman
Event — The blockade bites: clean water and grain run short in the packed city.
Effect — Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
SE·05
⚑
Siege Event
Zeal Fires the Host
Favours: Ottoman
Event — Dervishes and imams move through the camp, rousing the host to a fervor.
Effect — +1 Attack to all Ottoman Assaults this round.
SE·06
⚑
Siege Event
A Restless Night
Favours: Both
Event — Alarms and skirmishing all night grind down commander and soldier alike.
Effect — Both sides' committed leaders lose their bonus in the first Assault this round.
SE·07
⚑
Siege Event
Sickness Sweeps All
Favours: Both
Event — Disease rages through the crowded city and the filthy camp alike.
Effect — Ottoman discards 2 cards and Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
SE·08
1
Neutral
Zeal of the Ghazis
Event — Volunteer ghazis, drawn by faith and the promise of plunder, throng the irregular ranks.
Effect — +1 Attack to Bashi-bazouks for one Assault this round.
NEU·09
2
Neutral
The Last Grain Stores
Event — The city's magazines are thrown open and the last careful rations doled out.
Effect — Byzantine Reserve Pool +1.
NEU·10

OttomanByzantine
Galata's Choice
☪ Ottoman [Unhistorical] Besiege Galata: unlock the Golden Horn and deploy 3 Ottoman units there under Zaganos — they may not Assault next round.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Galata's Genoese honour their ties to the city: deploy 3 Genoese garrison on the sea walls.
NEU-D·01

OttomanByzantine
Janissary Bribes
☪ Ottoman [Generic] Address the corps' pay grievances before they fester: Ottoman Morale +1.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Bribe the Janissaries toward desertion: roll 1d10, 6+ permanently removes one Janissary-tier unit from the Ottoman pool — on success it also counts toward Ottoman elite casualties.

OttomanByzantine
Whispers of Betrayal
☪ Ottoman [Unhistorical] Spread rumors a Byzantine noble favors surrender: Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Spread rumors of Ottoman succession disputes: Ottoman -1 card.

1
OttomanByzantine
The Winds Shift
☪ Ottoman [Generic] Favorable winds aid the fleet: if the Golden Horn is unlocked, +1 Attack on an Assault there this round.
☦ Byzantine [Generic] Favorable winds aid a hoped-for relief ship: +1 to this round's Sue for Aid advance roll (Powers Stirring track).
NEU-D·04

OttomanByzantine
Orban's Offer
Round 1 onlyunique
☪ Ottoman [Historical] Confirm the Hungarian engineer's commitment to the Ottoman cause: Ottoman draws +1 card.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] The branch where Orban's cannon-casting goes to Byzantium instead: +1 extra Integrity from this round's Repair.

OttomanByzantine

Round 2+
☪ Ottoman [Generic] A Byzantine deserter reveals a weak point: +2 Attack on the next Assault this round.
☦ Byzantine [Generic] Tipped off by Ottoman traitors: +2 Defense in one sector (Byzantine's choice) this round.
NEU-D·06

OttomanByzantine

Round 2+
☪ Ottoman [Historical] Turahan Bey's deployment pins Constantine's brothers in the Peloponnese: Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Word reaches the Despots and a token relief contingent slips through from the south: Reserve Pool +2.

OttomanByzantine

Round 2+
☪ Ottoman [Historical] Mehmed refuses the Orhan blackmail, hardening his resolve: Byzantine Reserve Pool -1.
☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Promoting Orhan's claim: Ottoman Draw Track -1, and Combined Arms is unusable next round.

Round 3+
☪ Ottoman [Generic] Command Coordination is suspended this round — not even Constantine may combine two contingents.
☦ Byzantine [Generic] Any non-Constantine leader may combine their contingent with militia and one other, throughout the entire round.

Round 3+

☦ Byzantine [Unhistorical] Galata smuggles food into the city instead: Reserve Pool +2.
